recipe.description: ONION SOUP MIX SUB: 1/4 c. dried onion flakes, 1 tbsp beef bullion granules (I used 3 cubes), 1/4 tsp onion powder, 1/4 tsp parsley flakes, 1/4 tsp celery seed, 1/4 tsp paprika, 1/4 tsp pepper
recipe.notes: Tags: French, Main, Instant Pot, french onion soup, sour cream, chicken
recipe.title: French Onion chicken

ingredient_lines.raw_text: ½ cup of Sour cream (or Plain Greek yogurt)

steps.instruction: Put all ingredients in your labeled freezer bag and place in the freezer.
Place into the crockpot (ingredients can be thawed or frozen) and cook on low for 6-8 hours. Shred chicken and serve over rice.
